{{Quote|This planet has no end of threats to out new found prosperity. I, for one, shall not lower my guard|Sarguillo|<ref name="Champions of the Force (SWGTCG)">{{SWGTCG|set=Champions of the Force|scenario=Light Side scenario campaign}}</ref>}}
[[Captain/Legends|Captain]] '''Sarguillo''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Zabrak/Legends|Zabrak]] in charge of defending the village of [[Aurilia]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Dathomir/Legends|Dathomir]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

==Biography==
Sarguillo would keep the village safe through any way possible. He once tasked a [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]] individual sent to the village by the [[Old Man]] to kill a patrol of [[Sith Shadows]], afterward sending the individual to capture a [[Commander/Legends|Commander]] from one of the Shadows' bases for interrogation. Sometime after this, he led the defense of the village against hordes of Shadows with the help of the Force-sensitive individual.

Sometime later Aurilia was attacked by [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtroopers]] and [[Mellichae]], a [[Dark Jedi/Legends|Dark Jedi]] imprisoned there, made his escape. Two days after, a Rebel agent visited the village, looking for a fragment of the [[Codex of Tython]], an ancient [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Holocron/Legends|Holocron]], kept by Mellichae. Captain Sarguillo explained the agent that Mellichae had escaped and pointed where to find the Dark Jedi. He could not bring him to justice himself, because he was forced to remain in Aurilia to keep peace. Although the agent was attacked by both Mellichae and the [[Sith Shadows]], he was able to defeat them and recover the piece of [[Holocron/Legends|Holocron]] from the Zabrak. Afterward, Mellichae was once again returned to custody in Aurilia. The agent then went looking for [[Axkva Min]], a [[Nightsisters/Legends|Nightsister]] imprisoned in the [[Nightsister Stronghold]]. Sarguillo provided the agent with the [[Key of Exile]] required to enter the [[Chamber of Banishment]], where Min was being kept prisoner.<ref>{{SWGTCG|set=Champions of the Force|scenario=Light Side scenario campaign}}</ref>

==Behind the scenes==
Sarguillo appeared as a non-player character in the video game Star Wars Galaxies, a massively multiplayer online role-playing game developed by [[Sony]] and published by LucasArts, prior to its closure on [[December 15]], 2011.
